description:
Concert Diary recreates a personal diary for concerts and festivals.
Concert Diary is a simple Android app for recording your concerts and festivals as personal diary entries.

You can:
• Store events with date, location, acts and setlists
• Add personal notes and ratings for each event
• Attach photos and videos from concerts and festivals
• Keep an overview of attended events and artists seen
• Store ticket PDFs for quick access to upcoming events

Automatically fetch artist images via the Deezer API (disabled by default; enable in settings)

All data is stored locally on the device using Room.

The app is available in English and German.

Export and import of database supported.

Known issue:
• Occasionally, theme colors display incorrectly. Toggling the theme off and on again fixes it.
